targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  pt_1_pressure AS "PT1",
  pt_2_pressure AS "PT2",
  pt3 AS "PT3",
  pt4 AS "PT4"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  load_cell AS "Propellant Mass"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  qd_state AS "QD Step",
  flight_mode AS "Flight Mode",
  ignition AS "Ignition Command"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  pt_1_pressure AS "PT1",
  pt_2_pressure AS "PT2",
  pt3 AS "PT3",
  pt4 AS "PT4"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  sv_1_open AS "SV1",
  sv_2_open AS "SV2",
  ball_valve_open AS "Ball Valve",
  mav_open AS "MAV"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  temp AS "Altimeter Temp",
  rtd AS "ADC RTD Temp"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  num_satellites AS "Satellites"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Altitude (m)",
  pressure AS "Pressure (Pa)",
  temp AS "Temp (°C)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis Accel (m/s²)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0, 1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  latitude,
  longitude
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  altitude AS "Altitude"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  accel_x AS "X-Axis",
  accel_y AS "Y-Axis",
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  gyro_x AS "Roll (X)",
  gyro_y AS "Pitch (Y)",
  gyro_z AS "Yaw (Z)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  flight_mode AS "Flight Mode"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  latitude::numeric(10,5) || '°, ' || longitude::numeric(10,5) || '°' AS "Coordinates"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE 
  unit_id = 1 
  AND latitude != 0 
  AND longitude != 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Apogee"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1;

SELECT
  altitude AS "Altitude"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  accel_x AS "X-Axis",
  accel_y AS "Y-Axis",
  accel_z AS "Z-Axis"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  time AS "time",
  gyro_x AS "Roll (X)",
  gyro_y AS "Pitch (Y)",
  gyro_z AS "Yaw (Z)"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time;

WITH raw_data AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    
    -- Calculate velocities using the hardware timestamp, immune to network jitter
    (altitude - lag(altitude) OVER (ORDER BY time)) / 
    NULLIF("timestamp" - lag("timestamp") OVER (ORDER BY time), 0) AS raw_vel_z,
    
    ((longitude - lag(longitude) OVER (ORDER BY time)) * (111139.0 * cos(radians(latitude)))) / 
    NULLIF("timestamp" - lag("timestamp") OVER (ORDER BY time), 0) AS raw_vel_x,
    
    ((latitude - lag(latitude) OVER (ORDER BY time)) * 111139.0) / 
    NULLIF("timestamp" - lag("timestamp") OVER (ORDER BY time), 0) AS raw_vel_y
    
  FROM telemetry_data
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(time) AND 
    unit_id = 1 AND
    latitude IS NOT NULL AND 
    longitude IS NOT NULL AND
    latitude != 0 AND 
    longitude != 0
),
smoothed AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY time) AS pkt_num,
    AVG(raw_vel_z) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS vel_z,
    AVG(raw_vel_x) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS vel_x,
    AVG(raw_vel_y) OVER (ORDER BY time ROWS BETWEEN 4 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS vel_y
  FROM raw_data
)
SELECT
  time AS "time",
  -- Mask the first 10 un-smoothed edge packets to stabilize the graph's Y-axis
  CASE WHEN pkt_num > 10 THEN vel_z ELSE NULL END AS "Vertical Velocity",
  CASE WHEN pkt_num > 10 THEN vel_z / 343.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mach",
  CASE WHEN pkt_num > 10 THEN vel_x ELSE NULL END AS "Drift X",
  CASE WHEN pkt_num > 10 THEN vel_y ELSE NULL END AS "Drift Y",
  CASE 
    WHEN pkt_num <= 10 THEN NULL
    WHEN vel_x = 0 AND vel_y = 0 THEN 0 
    ELSE MOD(CAST(atan2d(vel_x, vel_y) + 360 AS NUMERIC), 360) 
  END AS "Heading"
FROM smoothed
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  ABS(accel_z) / 9.81 AS "Max Peak Shock"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(time) AND 
  unit_id = 1;

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Time Since Last Fill Station Packet

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - time)) AS "Seconds Since Last Rx"
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id = 1
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT *
FROM telemetry_data
WHERE unit_id IN (0,1)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 20;
